16 Telford Terrace, Oriental Bay, Wellington City

$1,550,000 Asking Price $1,550,000
531m²
Calling all investors and builders!!!

Asking price $1,550,000

This incredible opportunity is not to be missed.

Minutes away from Wellington's CBD, this section is surrounded by cafes and restaurants and is only short stroll to the waterfront.

This is a prime location with lots of opportunities for growing your investment portfolio. Occupants can surround themselves with an amazing community. There are not many sections out there similar to this.

So many ways to make huge $$$$$ with this section.

* Site coverage allowance 50%

* Residential Zone B

* Freehold property

* CV - $1,800,000

* WCC rates $6,026.27

This elevated site has Land area of 531m2 more or less.

OneRoof mentions

Listed for sale on OneRoof for 1872 days (last updated on 4 March) and was last sold in 2024 for $1,150,000. Its latest rating valuation by Wellington City council is $1,150,000 as of 2024. There are 12 properties for sale in Oriental Bay.

Oriental Bay, Wellington City
Oriental Bay is a suburb which lies within the Territorial Authority of Wellington, one of 52 residential suburbs which form the wider region. Oriental Bay is the 34th largest suburb of Wellington in terms of the total number of residential housing stock. Oriental Bay provides a range of housing stock, with the earliest residential housing recorded in the area constructed between 1890 - 1899. The majority of the residential housing stock in the locality was constructed between 2000 - 2009. Residential housing stock in Oriental Bay is made up of approximately 87% residential housing and 13% residential investment housing properties.
Learn more
